title: empodium plicatum
intro: Empodium plicatum, also known as the twisted leaf or wild iris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The medicinal properties of Empodium plicatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and treat wounds. Empodium plicatum is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
